zh.lifeSummary: Thomas Durant於1230年出生在英國英格蘭。他至少有1個兒子。他去世於1300年在他的家鄉享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Thomas Durant于1230年出生在英国英格兰。他至少有1个儿子。他去世于1300年在他的家乡享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Durant
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin) and French: variant of   Durand  .

English: variant of Darwent, a habitational name from Derwent in Derbyshire (now submerged by the Ladybower Reservoir) or Darwen in Lancashire, both named from rivers called Derwent, or, less frequently, from similarly named rivers in Cumbria, Durham, Northumbria, and Yorkshire, from a Celtic river name meaning ‘river where oak-trees grow abundantly’.

variants.name: Durand
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Lucien, Pierre, Jacques, Jean Claude, Michel, Andre, Marcel, Adrien, Benoit, Dominique, Gaston, Gilles.

French, Spanish, and English (of Norman origin): from a medieval French and Spanish personal name documented in the Latin(ized) form Durandus, supposedly derived from the Latin verb durare ‘to last, to endure’ (compare Italian Durante ). Compare also Durant .

History: Jean Durand dit Lafortune from Doeuil-sur-le-Mignon in Charente-Maritime, France, married Catherine Anenontha in Quebec City, QC, in 1662. Nicolas Durand from Chenommet in Charente, France, married Marie Renouard in Quebec City, QC, in 1665. Pierre Durand dit Desmarchais from Blois in Loir-et-Cher, France, married Jeanne Chartier in Quebec City, QC, in 1673. — This surname is listed in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Durrant
meanings: English (East Anglia and southeastern England): of Norman origin, a variant of   Durant   1.
French: variant, mostly Americanized, of   Durant   1.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: Thomas Durant was born in 1230, in England, United Kingdom. He had at least 1 son. He died in 1300, in his hometown, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Thomas Durant est né en 1230, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il a eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1300, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Thomas Durant wurde 1230 in England, United Kingdom geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1300 im Alter von 70 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Thomas Durant è nato il nel 1230 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1300, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Durantは1230年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1300年に故郷で70歳で死去した。

pt.lifeSummary: Thomas Durant nasceu em 1230, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1300, em sua cidade natal, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Thomas Durant родился в 1230 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1300 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 70 лет.
